title: Ethan Phillips
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Otheruses|Ethan}} {{Citation}} {{Person |image=[[File:EthanPhillips.jpg]] |name=Ethan Phillips |birth=[[February 8]], [[1950s|1955]], [[Wikipedia:Garden City, New York|Garden City]], [[Wikipedia:New York|New York]] |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:United States|American]] |occupation=[[Wikipedia:Actor|Actor]]
[[Wikipedia:Voice acting|Voice actor]] |companies= |website= }} '''Ethan Phillips''' (born [[February 8]], [[1950s|1955]]) provided voices for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games. He is probably best known for his portrayal of [[MemoryAlpha:Neelix|Neelix]] in [[MemoryAlpha:Star Trek: Voyager|''Star Trek: Voyager'']]. {{Bio-stub}} ==Roles== *''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – [[Hamman Flatt]], Transport Pilot *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[2-1C medical droid|Empire medical droid]], Krantian governor, Royal grenade trooper *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – [[Galon Lor]], [[Tamlen]], Additional Voices. ==External links== *{{WP|Ethan Phillips}} *[[Memoryalpha:Ethan Phillips|Ethan Phillips]] on [[Memoryalpha:Memory Alpha|Memory Alpha]] *{{IMDb|name/nm0680392}} [[Category:Star Wars: Force Commander voice actors]] [[Category:Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds voice actors]] [[Category:Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic voice actors]]
